<!--
  Thanks for opening a PR! Please fill out the sections below so we can merge quickly.
  For small content fixes (one typo, one translation tweak), the short form at the bottom is fine.
-->

## What & why

<!-- 1-3 sentences: what does this PR do, and why does it matter? -->

## Related issue(s)

<!-- e.g. "Fixes #42" or "Part of #100". If no issue, briefly justify inline. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🌐 Translation improvement (content/en-US/…)
- [ ] ✨ New prompt (content/{locale}/prompts/…)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation / typo
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (code)
- [ ] 🚀 Feature (code)
- [ ] 🏗️ Build / CI / tooling
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor (no functional change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `python3 scripts/validate_prompts.py` — passes
- [ ] I ran `python3 scripts/merge_content.py` — succeeds
- [ ] For translation PRs: I read [TRANSLATION_GUIDE.md](../TRANSLATION_GUIDE.md)
- [ ] This PR touches ≤ 5 prompts, **or** there's prior discussion in an Issue
- [ ] No hard-coded secrets, API keys, or personal info
- [ ] I understand my contribution will be MIT-licensed
- [ ] **First-time contributor?** I added myself to [CONTRIBUTORS.md](../CONTRIBUTORS.md) under "All Contributors"

## Screenshots / recordings (if UI change)

<!-- Drag images or paste a short screen recording. -->

---

<!-- For tiny fixes (1-line typo etc.), just write one sentence and skip the form above. -->
